HomeDestinationsPelling
Sikkim

Pelling

The Crown Jewel of Sikkim

4.7
(412 reviews)
Gyalshing, Sikkim
mountainsnatureculturetrekking

Overview

Introduction

Pelling is one of the most popular destinations in Sikkim, known for its breathtaking views of Mt. Kanchenjunga, ancient monasteries, and the iconic Pemayangtse Monastery.

History

Pelling was historically important as the second capital of the former kingdom of Sikkim and is home to some of the oldest monasteries.

Altitude

2,150 m

Best Time

October to May

Temperature

Summer: 15-25°C | Winter: 2-10°C

Location

Gyalshing, Sikkim

Weather

Pleasant throughout the year

Summer

15-25°C

Winter

2-10°C

Monsoon

18-22°C

Gallery

Nearby Attractions

Religious

Pemayangtse Monastery

One of the oldest and most important monasteries in Sikkim.

Heritage

Rabdentse Ruins

Ancient ruins of the second capital of Sikkim.

Nature

Khecheopalri Lake

Sacred wish-fulfilling lake surrounded by forest.

Religious

Sangacholing Monastery

One of the oldest monasteries in Sikkim with stunning views.

Hidden Gems

Yuksom Village

The first capital of Sikkim with historical significance.

Why visit: Historical trek starting point and cultural immersion

Kanchenjunga Falls

A majestic waterfall on the way to Yuksom.

Why visit: Beautiful natural spectacle

Viewpoints

panoramic

Pelling Skywalk

Glass-bottomed skywalk with mountain views.

sunrise

Sangacholing Viewpoint

Best sunrise over Kanchenjunga.

Local Cuisine

Must-Try Dishes

MomosThukpaAloo DumSel RotiChhurpi Soup

Restaurants

Taste of Sikkim

4.5

Sikkimese & Tibetan • ₹300-600

Authentic Sikkimese cuisine with a view.

The Pelling Kitchen

4.3

Multi-cuisine • ₹400-800

Popular restaurant with diverse menu.

Cafes

Hilltop Cafe

4.4

Specialty: Organic Coffee

Best coffee with mountain views.

Rabdentse Cafe

4.2

Specialty: Hot Chocolate

Cozy cafe near the ruins.

Street Food

Momo Stall at Main Market

Freshly steamed and fried momos with spicy chutney

Thukpa Corner

Hot noodle soup with local vegetables and meat

Shopping

Pelling Market

Local market for souvenirs and crafts.

Prayer flagsSikkimese handicraftsOrganic teaThangka paintings

Culture & Festivals

Culture

Rich Himalayan culture with Buddhist monasteries and Nepali traditions.

LosarBuddha JayantiDashainTihar

Adventure Activities

Pelling Skywalk

Easy

Walk on the glass skywalk.

1 hr
₹200

Yuksom Trek

Moderate

Trek to Yuksom and Dubdi Monastery.

1 day
₹2,000

How to Reach

train

Nearest railway station is New Jalpaiguri (NJP)

~3 hrs drive
₹150-500

flight

Nearest airport is Bagdogra (IXB)

~2.5 hrs drive
₹3,000-8,000

bus

Direct buses from Siliguri and Darjeeling

~3-4 hrs
₹200-400

car

Private taxis and shared jeeps available

~2.5 hrs
₹2,500-4,000

Nearby Railway

New Jalpaiguri Junction (NJP) - 72 km

Nearby Airport

Bagdogra Airport (IXB) - 78 km

Taxi Fare

Shared: ₹150-200, Private: ₹2,500-3,500

Bike Rental

₹500-800/day (Royal Enfield/Scooty)
